briefdescription.para: This function tests the functioning of the Scu Private WDT driver and hardware in Timer mode using interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: After one expiration of the timeout interval, an interrupt is generated and the Event flag bit is set in the watchdog interrupt status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of XScuWdt driver.
contains the base address of the device

briefdescription.para: This function is the Interrupt handler for the WDT Interrupt of the Wdt device.

detaileddescription.para: It is called on the expiration of the timer counter in interrupt context.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the Scu Private Wdt interrupt example.
This file contains a design example using the Xilinx SCU Private Watchdog Timer driver (XScuWdt) and hardware in Timer mode using interrupts.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a sdm 01/15/10 First release 2.5 asa 07/18/23 Added support for system device tree based workflow decouplig flow. Interrupt wrapper support has also been added. 2.5 dp 09/08/23 Update example to stop wdt at end of the test 2.7 vlt 12/29/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details. 2.7 ht 02/10/26 Fix unused parameter warnings.
